title: Aidan (disambiguation)
content:
'''Aidan''' is a first name that may refer to:
*'''[[Aidan Barton]]''', the baby who portrayed [[Luke Skywalker|Luke]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia]] in [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Revenge of the Sith'']].
*'''[[Aidan Bok]]''', a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] killed by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]]
*'''[[Aidan Hennessy]]''', ''[[What's The Story?]]'' author of the [[Onara Kuat]] and [[Pello Scrambas]] entries in the [[Databank (original)|Databank]]

{{Disambig}}
